emails.subject: Re: apb checkosut
emails.body: Re: apb checkosut changed to pinnacle west and you might mention to apb, if you feel like it, that it would save their time during checkout if they told tom the correct counterparty when the trade was done he said apb never seems to know whether it's APS or pinnacle, but for his part he doesn't mind which counterparty it's with anyway, just fyi... thanks, Kate Kerri Thompson@ENRON 03/15/2001 01:36 PM
